hero.headlineHtml:
Wall Street works for Wall Street.
Not for you.
hero.subtitle: The AI-native financial assistant that works only for you — bringing the power of institutional-grade stock analysis to individual investors.
features.heading: Built for Modern Intelligent Investors
features.subtitle: What if you could invest alongside Buffett, Munger, and Lynch? Deep Values distills their playbooks into moat watchlists, intrinsic-value calculators, and interactive fundamental analysis — all in a single workflow.
features.slide1.title: Values Watchlist
features.slide1.bullet1: Intrinsic-value investors aren't price-watchers — we're value-watchers.
features.slide1.bullet2: Each value is colored against the thresholds Buffett, Munger, Greenblatt, and other legends actually used.
features.slide1.bullet3: Your whole watchlist resolves into a verdict at a glance.
features.slide2.title: Intrinsic Value Calculator
features.slide2.bullet1: Before you buy, know what it's worth.
features.slide2.bullet2: Three independent valuations — DCF, Owner Earnings, and Damodaran — cross-checked against peers.
features.slide2.bullet3: See at a glance where today's price sits: above, around, or below what it's worth.
features.slide3.title: Financials Deep Dive
features.slide3.bullet1: The truth about a business is in its full financial history.
features.slide3.bullet2: Every income, expense, cash flow, and balance-sheet line — the company's full history, sourced straight from SEC filings.
features.slide3.bullet3: Easy to watch, easy to track.
features.slide4.title: Smart Money & Gurus
features.slide4.bullet1: See which legends own a stock, how big the bet is, and how it shifted quarter over quarter.
features.slide4.bullet2: QoQ deltas surface fresh conviction and quiet exits before they hit the headlines.
features.slide4.bullet3: Tap a name to read their full thesis and follow their next move.
features.slide5.title: Filings & Earnings
features.slide5.bullet1: Every 8-K, 10-Q, and 10-K lands within an hour of EDGAR — never miss a filing.
features.slide5.bullet2: Jump straight to the earnings audio, transcript, and investor relations page.
features.slide5.bullet3: We don't host the audio — links open YouTube, Seeking Alpha, or the company's IR, so the source stays original.
intelligence.heading: Intelligence That Only Aligns With You.
intelligence.subtitle: Other apps profit when you trade. DeepValues.AI is built to make you a better investor — reading every filing, weighing the evidence, and showing its sources so you can trust the verdict instead of the confetti.
intelligence.slide2.desc: Voice or text. Always with sources.
intelligence.slide3.desc: Reads every filing and call — conviction in minutes.
intelligence.slide4.headlineHtml: Reads every word, surfaces what matters.
intelligence.slide4.desc: Distilled to what moves the thesis.
intelligence.slide6.desc: The AI rebuilds the full income statement as a single Sankey — segment revenue, cost of revenue, operating expenses, taxes, all the way to net income. One look tells you where the money comes from and where it goes.
pricing.headline: Pricing aligned with your interest.
pricing.subhead: Pay for the research you actually run. No advertiser kickbacks, no promoted stocks, no conflict of interest, no surprise charges.
pricing.basic.name: Basic (Free)
pricing.basic.desc: Get a feel for Deep Values.
pricing.plus.name: Plus
pricing.pro.name: Pro
pricing.api.name: API
pricing.api.feature2: · Bundle, Smart Money, IV, Indicators, Digest endpoints
pricing.credits.heading: Credit packs
pricing.credits.intro: Top up any plan whenever you need to. Plus members get an extra 10% on packs; Pro members get 15%.
pricing.credits.starter.name: Starter
pricing.credits.standard.name: Standard
pricing.credits.power.name: Power
pricing.credits.bulk.name: Bulk
pricing.honest: The credits you spend are the actual cost of running a multi-analyst AI research pipeline on your behalf. No advertiser kickbacks. No promoted stocks. No affiliate links inside our briefings. The product works only as well as it's useful to you — because that's the only way we make money.
